parsed.availability_comment: Available for IPL 2026 as of March 23, 2026; role uncertainty is selection-related, not availability-related.
parsed.availability_note: In RCB squad and no current Duffy-specific injury/suspension report found; small deduction for normal pace-bowler rotation/uncertainty.
parsed.followup_reason: Duffy is fit, but early-match XI depends on Josh Hazlewood’s final availability and RCB’s chosen overseas combination.
parsed.overseas_competition_comment: RCB staff explicitly described Duffy as backing up Hazlewood; overseas batting core further squeezes XI access.
parsed.overseas_competition_note: Heavy overseas-slot pressure; clearest path is as Hazlewood cover or conditions-based extra seamer.
parsed.playing_xi_comment: Official RCB messaging frames him as Hazlewood backup/reserve, so not a locked starter.
